title: Fantasma Mobile Event
description: Install-scoped mobile event contract for Fantasma.

install_id.description: Stable install-scoped client identity used by ingest and backend sessionization. It is not a person identifier and it is not a public metrics query dimension.

os_version.description: Optional built-in OS version. First-party SDKs populate it when supported.

locale.description: Optional built-in locale. First-party SDKs populate it when supported.
